title: OpenAI Unveils GPT-Rosalind AI Model for Life Sciences Research
summary: OpenAI Unveils GPT-Rosalind AI Model for Life Sciences Research top of page OpenAI on Thursday introduced GPT-Rosalind, an artificial intelligence model designed to enhance biology knowledge and scientific research capabilities. This launch deepens the organisation’s push into the life sciences
content: OpenAI Unveils GPT-Rosalind AI Model for Life Sciences Research top of page OpenAI on Thursday introduced GPT-Rosalind, an artificial intelligence model designed to enhance biology knowledge and scientific research capabilities. This launch deepens the organisation’s push into the life sciences field. ... The GPT-Rosalind model is named after 20th-century British scientist Rosalind Franklin. It aims to support research ... Demand for AI-powered tools to accelerate drug discovery and research has grown among pharmaceutical companies, ... The model is designed to help researchers accelerate the early stages of discovery, supporting evidence synthesis, ... tools, and suggest new experiments. GPT-Rosalind was built on OpenAI’s newest internal models. GPT-Rosalind is available as a research preview within ChatGPT, Codex, and the application programming interface for qualified customers. This access is managed through OpenAI’s trusted access deployment structure. OpenAI is also launching a free Life Sciences research plugin for Codex, which connects scientists to over 50 scientific tools and data sources. The company is collaborating with customers such as Amgen, Moderna, and Thermo Fisher Scientific, among others, to apply GPT-Rosalind across various workflows. Separately, OpenAI on Tuesday unveiled GPT-5.4-Cyber, a variant of its latest flagship model. This model is fine-tuned specifically for defensive cybersecurity work, following rival Anthropic’s introduction of its frontier AI model, Mythos. OpenAI launched GPT-Rosalind, an AI model for life sciences research. Named after British scientist Rosalind Franklin, it supports biochemistry, drug discovery, and translational medicine. Jetzt hat Anthropic mit Claude Design ein KI-basiertes kollaboratives Designtool vorgestellt. ... title: GPT-Rosalind pushes OpenAI into drug discovery with 50+ tools
summary: GPT-Rosalind pushes OpenAI into drug discovery with 50+ tools - Insights OpenAI is moving deeper into scientific work with GPT-Rosalind, a purpose-built reasoning model for biology, drug discovery, and translational medicine. The model is not a broad consumer rollout: it is available as a research
content: GPT-Rosalind pushes OpenAI into drug discovery with 50+ tools - Insights OpenAI is moving deeper into scientific work with GPT-Rosalind, a purpose-built reasoning model for biology, drug discovery, and translational medicine. The model is not a broad consumer rollout: it is available as a research preview in ChatGPT, Codex, and the API for qualified customers through a trusted access program. That framing matters because the target workflow is not casual Q&A. OpenAI is aiming at evidence synthesis, hypothesis generation, experimental planning, data analysis, and tool-heavy research routines where a wrong shortcut can waste months in the lab. The practical hook is the April 16 source post: OpenAI says scientists can use a Life Sciences research plugin for Codex that connects models to more than 50 public multi-omics databases, literature sources, biology tools, and repeatable skills. The plugin is freely accessible, while GPT-Rosalind itself starts with qualified Enterprise customers in the U.S. under eligibility, governance, and security review. OpenAI says research preview use will not consume existing credits or tokens, subject to abuse guardrails. The benchmark claims are the reason this clears a higher bar than a normal vertical-AI launch. OpenAI says GPT-Rosalind achieved leading performance on BixBench among models with published scores, and beat GPT-5.4 on 6 of 11 LABBench2 ... The early customer list also shows where OpenAI wants the model tested: Amgen, Moderna, Thermo Fisher Scientific, the Allen Institute, Novo Nordisk, NVIDIA, Benchling, UCSF School of Pharmacy, and Oracle Health and Life Sciences are named in the launch material. OpenAI also says it is working with Los Alamos National Laboratory on AI-guided protein ... The caveat is just as important as the headline. GPT-Rosalind is gated because biology models raise safety and misuse questions that normal productivity software does not. The near-term test will be whether a model that performs well on ... GPT-Rosalind targets biology workflows across ChatGPT, Codex and API OpenAI is moving model specialization into scientific work rather than generic chat. GPT-Rosalind is framed for protein reasoning, chemical reasoning, genomics, biochemistry and tool use, with access starting as a research preview for ... 1 Sciences 5d ago 2 min read OpenAI Says ChatGPT Is Becoming a Scientific Collaborator OpenAI says ChatGPT is already being used at research scale across science and mathematics. title: Z Claude Design zaplecze graficzne staje się zbędne. Oto co potrafi nowy model Anthropic
summary: Z Claude Design zaplecze graficzne staje się zbędne. Oto co potrafi nowy model Anthropic Projektowanie staje się tak proste, jak pisanie wiadomości.
content: Z Claude Design zaplecze graficzne staje się zbędne. Oto co potrafi nowy model Anthropic Projektowanie staje się tak proste, jak pisanie wiadomości. Claude Design to nowa propozycja od Anthropic, która udowadnia, że do stworzenia profesjonalnego layoutu nie potrzeba już lat doświadczenia z programami graficznymi. Claude ... Spis treści Odkryj tablet graficzny od HUION Claude Design – czym jest nowe narzędzie Anthropic Claude Design to nowy produkt Anthropic Labs (w fazie research preview), dostępny dla użytkowników planów Pro, Max, Team i Enterprise w ramach istniejących subskrypcji. Narzędzie działa w przeglądarce, wykorzystuje najnowszy model Claude Opus 4.7 i ma wspierać zarówno projektantów UX/UI, jak i product managerów, marketerów czy zaawansowanych użytkowników bez silnego zaplecza technicznego. Anthropic dołącza w ten sposób do rosnącej liczby firm rozwijających własne narzędzia projektowe oparte na sztucznej ... Kluczową ambicją Anthropic jest zbudowanie środowiska, w którym od pierwszego promptu do gotowego prototypu czy slajdów można dojść w ramach jednej konwersacji, bez skakania między wieloma aplikacjami. To nie jest klasyczny generatorów obrazów – Claude Design ma być pełnoprawnym edytorem projektów, który operuje na komponentach, strukturze strony, typografii i systemach designu. Anthropic podkreśla, że jest narzędzie do pracy nad konkretnymi produktami, a nie tylko ... Anthropic pozycjonuje Claude Design jako narzędzie „do wszystkiego, co wizualne” w pracy zespołów produktowych, ... Ciekawą kategorią są tzw. frontier design – projekty łączące interfejs z kodem, multimediami, głosem czy elementami 3D, ... Silnym wyróżnikiem Claude Design jest bliska integracja z Claude Code – drugim filarem oferty Anthropic Labs, skupionym na pracy z kodem. Anthropic podkreśla ... współpracuje już także na poziomie czatbota i automatyzacji treści. title: Anthropic Launches Claude Design for Visual Assets — Datagrom AI News
summary: Anthropic Launches Claude Design for Visual Assets — Datagrom AI News Anthropic Launches Claude Design for Visual Assets Anthropic has launched Claude Design, a graphic design tool in public preview available to Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscribers. Users can generate visual assets through
content: Anthropic Launches Claude Design for Visual Assets — Datagrom AI News Anthropic Launches Claude Design for Visual Assets Anthropic has launched Claude Design, a graphic design tool in public preview available to Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscribers. Users can generate visual assets through natural language prompts, upload reference images or documents, and refine outputs using a Tweaks feature. The tool supports design systems and code repository integration. Powered by the new Claude Opus 4.7 model, Claude Design can produce interactive graphics, ads, slides, and UI components. The announcement sent Figma shares down over . The tool was built by Anthropic Labs, co-led by Instagram co-founder Mike Krieger, signaling plans for more task-specific AI products. title: Gemini Live redesign replaces fullscreen interface on Android
summary: Gemini Live redesign replaces fullscreen interface on Android Gemini Live redesign replaces fullscreen interface on Android Visually, Gemini Live has remained mostly unchanged since launch, but Google is now testing a redesign that removes the fullscreen interface on Android.
content: Gemini Live redesign replaces fullscreen interface on Android Gemini Live redesign replaces fullscreen interface on Android Visually, Gemini Live has remained mostly unchanged since launch, but Google is now testing a redesign that removes the fullscreen interface on Android. Instead of a fullscreen interface, Gemini Live just takes over the Gemini app homepage. The top bar changes to “Live with Gemini” and adds the transcript button. At the bottom, the prompt box is replaced by a pill-shaped container that features the blue waveform. At the left, you ... Google previously tested a more minimalist design that just had camera sharing and the keyboard icon, with muting a hidden gesture that involved double-tapping the waveform. This new approach is more obvious. Google app beta (version 17.14) users are widely seeing this Gemini Live redesign. It’s currently limited to the Gemini app and not the overlay, which is unchanged today but will also be redesigned to take after the in-app experience. Gemini Live removing its fullscreen UI is an interesting move given how iconic and consistent it has been. While ...
